data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for calendar synchronization with Google/Outlook. However, there is no evidence provided that explicitly confirms the functionality of calendar sync, nor are there any successful prior steps that demonstrate this capability. The linked use case mentions the need for calendar sync, but without concrete evidence of its implementation, the requirement remains unfulfilled.
gaps: No evidence confirming the implementation of calendar sync (Google/Outlook)

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
